IHU Signs Cooperation Agreement with YETEV

22.03.2022

President of Ibn Haldun University Prof. Atilla Arkan hosted Hayati Oktay, General Manager of Educational Institutions of the New Turkey Education Foundation (YETEV), and his accompanying delegation at IHU's campus on Thursday, March 17.

President Prof. Atilla Arkan hosted Hayati Oktay, General Manager of Educational Institutions of the New Turkey Education Foundation (YETEV), and his accompanying delegation at Ibn Haldun University (IHU) on Thursday, March 17. During the visit, a cooperation protocol was signed between IHU and the New Turkey Education Foundation (YETEV).

Within the scope of the protocol signed in the presence of the university's Secretary General Sebahattin Belik, there will be cooperation between the two institutions in education, science and social fields.

The signed agreement will also include developing joint projects of both institutions and to provide convenience and support to the members of both institutions in various subjects, especially education, research and promotion activities.
